# orm-auth-current-user-id

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the currentUserId query

## Usage

```typescript
db.query.currentUserId().execute()
```

## Examples

### Run currentUserId

```typescript
const result = await db.query.currentUserId().execute();
```
